title: Donald Trump's ‘pretty serious’ UFO talk returns as US struggles with Iran war: 'Clearly a distraction'
description: “I recently directed Secretary of War to begin releasing govt files relating to UFOs and unexplained aerial phenomena,” Trump said at a far-right support event.

title: Trump's UFO disclosure takes step forward as world waits with bated breath
description: The federal domain aliens.gov, which previously appeared inactive, recently showed signs of life, reigniting interest in the release of alleged UFO documents tied to the government

title: Trump says UFO documents coming 'very soon'
description: The president described the topic as "something that really captivates the mind," vowing the release was forthcoming.

title: Former Intelligence Official Testifies to UAP Capabilities, Trump Hints at Document Release
description: A former senior intelligence official testified before Congress about Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAP) splitting aircraft formations. President Trump has indicated that government files related to UAPs will be released soon, amidst growing pressure from Capitol Hill to declassify information. While Trump has not confirmed belief in alien origins, the push for transparency stems from concerns about national security and potential threats posed by these phenomena in sensitive airspace.

title: All you need to know as 'disruptor' Donald Trump urged to expose 'wild' UFO secrets
description: Congressman Tim Burchett is calling on Donald Trump to expose classified UFO files, claiming government briefings are "pretty wild" and there's a cover-up.
